title: Finite Precision Recall Classifier Ranking

solver_reuse.target: finite precision-recall bad average-precision QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact finite classifier-ranking replay computes average precision 34/45 from precision at three positive hits, while a malformed row claims 3/4, isolating a compact scalar Farkas conflict.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional precision-recall rows only when they add distinct tie-convention, interpolation-policy, multiclass averaging, calibration, confidence-interval, or numerical-honesty pressure; keep statistical generalization and floating-point classifier claims in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed finite scored rows, class counts, threshold precision/recall point, precision-recall curve, and exact rational average precision as deterministic replay obligations.
Route the false average-precision claim through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the conflicting average-precision equation.
Expose the pack through probability, statistics, finite classifier, ROC/AUC, precision-recall, exact-vs-floating, and learner-query surfaces.

Keep threshold policy, calibration, confidence intervals, general tie conventions, interpolation conventions, continuous score-distribution theory, statistical generalization, and floating-point classifier behavior marked theorem or numerical-honesty horizon.
